situation: New neologisms are emerging in Ukrainian media texts, requiring analysis and understanding.

options.consequence: Missed opportunities for insight into changing realities

common_rookie_mistake: Failing to recognize the importance of neologisms in understanding societal-political processes
consequence_if_wrong: Lack of understanding of the changing realities and societal-political processes
rationale: Neologisms reflect the changing realities and societal-political processes, and analyzing them can provide valuable insights.
